title: Eutassa laubenfelsii
taxonomy: Eutassa laubenfelsii is classified as a species within the family Dipterocarpaceae. This family is a group of flowering plants that are native to tropical regions, particularly in Southeast Asia. Eutassa laubenfelsii is a member of the genus Eutassa, which is a small group of trees that are characterized by their distinctive seed pods. The classification of Eutassa laubenfelsii is further supported by its unique combination of morphological and molecular characteristics. As a result, Eutassa laubenfelsii is a well-defined species within the plant kingdom.

preparations: Eutassa laubenfelsii herbal preparations are primarily used in traditional medicine in the regions where the plant is native. side_effects: Eutassa laubenfelsii is a plant species that may cause skin irritation or allergic reactions due to its sap or leaves.
